name: Linode Object Storage
description: Linode Object Storage — S3-compatible object storage from Akamai/Linode. $5/month base subscription includes 250GB storage + 1TB outbound transfer; overage at $0.02/GB storage and $0.005/GB egress. Bucket-scoped REST with AWS SigV4 against {cluster}.linodeobjects.com. Cluster examples: us-east-1, us-southeast-1, us-mia-1, us-iad-1, us-ord-1, us-sea-1, eu-central-1, ap-south-1, fr-par-1. Generate Object Storage Access Keys at cloud.linode.com → Object Storage → Access Keys.

credential_fields.name: cluster
credential_fields.label: Cluster
credential_fields.description: Linode cluster id (used as both the SigV4 region and the endpoint subdomain). Examples: us-east-1, us-mia-1, us-iad-1, us-ord-1, us-sea-1, eu-central-1, ap-south-1, fr-par-1.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: SigV4 Region
credential_fields.description: Region used for SigV4 signing. Almost always equals the cluster id; override only if Linode publishes a separate signing region.

credential_fields.name: access_key_id
credential_fields.label: Linode Access Key
credential_fields.description: From cloud.linode.com → Object Storage → Access Keys → Create Access Key. Limited Access Keys can be scoped to specific buckets — prefer those over unrestricted keys.

credential_fields.name: secret_access_key
credential_fields.label: Linode Secret Key
credential_fields.description: Shown once at key creation. Regenerate the key if lost.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List objects in a bucket (S3-compatible ListObjectsV2). Returns XML; parse Contents[].Key / Size / LastModified, plus IsTruncated + NextContinuationToken for pagination.

prefix.description: Filter to keys starting with this prefix.

continuation-token.description: Pagination cursor from a prior IsTruncated response.

tools.name: put_object
tools.description: Upload an object. Pass content as 'body'; runner sends verbatim with SigV4 integrity hash. Single-PUT cap is 5GB; use multipart for larger.

body.description: Object content. Bytes welcome — the runner sends them verbatim.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Download an object. Response body is the raw object bytes (response cap 200MB).

tools.name: delete_object
tools.description: Delete a single object. Returns 204 on success.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List all Linode buckets the access key can see. Returns XML; ListAllMyBucketsResult.Buckets.Bucket[] has names + creation dates.
